Our founding conviction

In a world saturated by AI, machines produce content.
Only humans create meaning.

Communication is not a distribution layer.
It is the architecture of adoption.
It is conceptualized, structured, deployed —
with the right people, at the right moment, in the right format.

do.

Strategy & Communication to Growth

Corporate
communication.

Corporate communication is the foundation of trust with your investors, partners and regulators. We Are Digital Collective designs institutional strategies that reflect your positioning and protect your reputation.

Corporate positioning & narrative

Conceptualization of the corporate narrative, purpose and differentiating positioning.

Foundation

Investor communications & fundraising

Preparation of pitches, memorandums and narratives for funds, family offices and institutional investors.

Investor Relations

Crisis communications & reputation

Message management during crisis. Preserving the reputation and trust of stakeholders.

Crisis Management

Internal communications & change management

Supporting organisational transformations through aligned internal communication.

Press & public
relations.

Press relations cannot be improvised in complex sectors. They are built on years of credibility and established trust with the journalists who matter.

📡

Tier-1 media relations

Access to a network of journalists in financial, tech and general media. Editorial placement, interviews, opinion pieces and press releases.

Media
🎤

Thought leadership & speaking

Positioning executives as reference voices. Writing opinion pieces, interview preparation, keynotes and roundtables.

Leadership
🏛

⚡

Media crisis communication

differentiator.

"In complex environments, what decision-makers lack most is not information — it's perspective. The collective exists for that."

Elodie Jallet — Founder, We Are Digital Collective
Founder & Director

20 years at the
interface of complexity.

Elodie Jallet is a strategic communications expert with 20 years across demanding sectors: cybersecurity (Kudelski Security, 5 years), fintech & blockchain (Bitfinex, Head of Communications), digital transformation, public affairs. Based in Geneva, active across 3 continents.

MBA Strategy & Communication (SKEMA) · MBA Marketing (MOD'SPE Paris) · FR · EN · ES · RU
